title: Quasar
description: Choose 1 of 3 random Colorless cards to add into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
upgraded_description: Choose 1 of 3 random [gold]Upgraded[/gold] Colorless cards to add into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
notes: Offers a choice between 3 random Colorless cards to add to hand. If the card is Upgraded, the offered cards are Upgraded.
